build_system: npm workspaces with tsc --noEmit for type checking
test_framework: Custom node scripts/test.js that validates file structure, exports, and type annotations
verification_instructions: Run node scripts/test.js from project root - checks all packages have src/index.ts barrel exports
setup_instructions: No setup needed - pure TypeScript without compilation, validated by structure checker
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no npm install possible. All code must be written directly without external dependencies. Use only TypeScript with type annotations.
contribution_requirements: Each package needs: src/index.ts (barrel export), src/types.ts (type definitions), src/core/ (implementation files). No package.json or tsconfig.json observed in existing packages.
key_patterns: 1) Each package has src/index.ts barrel exporting from src/core/*.ts files. 2) src/types.ts defines all interfaces/types. 3) Classes are exported with full JSDoc. 4) Files use header comment blocks with package name. 5) Apps have src/ with components/, hooks/, pages/, services/, types/ directories.
directory_structure: packages/ - shared libraries (18 existing). apps/ - 9 applications (quantmail, quantchat, quantads, quantai, quantedits, quantmax, quantneon, quantsync, quantube). scripts/ - test runner.
